title: Prevent verification-skipped-before-done
summary: Reusable prevention workflow extracted from a replay-passed failure genome.
when_to_use: Use when the task resembles the stored failure family.
when_not_to_use: Do not use for unrelated debugging work.

steps.title: Inspect the family
steps.instruction: Restate the invariant and confirm the current task matches the family.

steps.title: Apply the repair
steps.instruction: Use the stored repair operator in the current context.

safety_notes: Require explicit approval for destructive changes.
maintainability_notes: Keep lineage to the source genome.
cost_notes: Prefer the smallest trustworthy verification surface.
